chaos_ranked.title: AWS Kiro Flaw Let a Poisoned Web Page Rewrite Its Config and Run Code
chaos_ranked.summary: Hidden text on a web page was enough to make Kiro, AWS's agentic coding IDE, rewrite its own configuration file and run an attacker's code on a developer's machine, with no approval step able to stop ...

chaos_ranked.summary:

chaos_ranked.summary:
